title: polystichum aristatum var. assamicum
intro: Polystichum aristatum var. assamicum, commonly known as Assam silver fern, is a variety of fern native to the northeastern Indian state of Assam, characterized by its delicate fronds and silver-green foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polystichum aristatum var. assamicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the fronds in hot water, making a tea or infusion that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
